headline: NFLX Has Bounced From This Price Before. Now What?
summary: After a steep slide, Netflix stock has landed on a price floor that has launched major rallies before, forcing investors to decide if the business is strong enough to make history rhyme.

headline: NHL hockey is a great media property, says Commissioner Gary Bettman
